title: turnera acaulis
intro: Turnera acaulis, also known as Prickly Poppy, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera acaulis include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Turnera acaulis typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or capsules.
